parameters.query:
SELECT
  d.dialog_id,
  d.store_id,
  d.employee_id,
  d.status,
  e.full_name AS employee_name,
  r.full_name AS regional_name,
  r.telegram_chat_id AS regional_chat_id,
  ar.result,
  COALESCE(n.id::text, '') AS notification_id
FROM dialogs d
JOIN analysis_results ar ON ar.dialog_id = d.dialog_id
JOIN employees e ON e.employee_id = d.employee_id
JOIN regionals r ON r.regional_id = e.regional_id
LEFT JOIN notifications n
  ON n.dialog_id = d.dialog_id AND n.recipient_type = 'regional'
WHERE d.dialog_id = '{{ $json.body.dialog_id }}'::uuid
  AND d.status IN ('analyzed', 'notified_employee');

UPDATE dialogs
SET status = 'awaiting_training_confirm', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE dialog_id = '{{ $('CODE').item.json.dialog_id }}'::uuid
RETURNING dialog_id, status;
